◎年　　代　2021

◎片　　长　81分钟

◎简　　介  

　　Traveling through Eastern Europe, a group of American tourists randomly ends up in Pripyat. The ghosts of the murdered townspeople begin to torment travelers - the Exclusion Zone turns out to be not so abandoned. The guys are faced with the task of finding out: who or what continues to live where supposedly there is no life.
